document.source_title: KKR vs GT IPL 2026 Highlights: Kolkata beat Gujarat by 29 runs, stay alive in playoff race

claims.claim_text: Kolkata Knight Riders set a target of 248 runs.
claims.evidence_text: KKR compile a score of 247 for the loss of two wickets in 20 overs.

claims.claim_text: Gujarat Titans fell short of the target.
claims.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans never really looked capable of posing a serious challenge to the target of 248 set by Kolkata Knight Riders.

entities.evidence_text: Sudharsan was forced to retire hurt after getting off to a good start.

entities.description: A cricketer who played for Kolkata Knight Riders.
entities.evidence_text: Sunil Narine was the star once again for KKR, finishing with figures of 2/29.

entities.description: A cricketer who played for Kolkata Knight Riders.
entities.evidence_text: Raghuvanshi finished off unbeaten on 82 off 44 balls.
